page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 8369B processor with an x86_64 architecture, delivering 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs at a base clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks place this instance consistently in the average tier across most standard workloads. The Intel Xeon processor achieves a single-core stress-ng score of 1865.39 and a multi-core score of 30983.52. Memory bandwidth tests show read-only speeds of 1689.81 GB/sec for small cached blocks and 141.73 GB/sec for large uncached blocks, alongside a write speed of 65.94 GB/sec. In language model processing, the instance demonstrates strong text generation capabilities for small 135M models at 282.15 tokens per second, while medium 7B models process text generation at an average rate of 17.54 tokens per second.

From a resource density perspective, the ecs.r7.8xlarge offers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive applications by bundling a high RAM capacity with dedicated compute cores, avoiding the added cost of local storage. However, the lack of local NVMe SSDs and the absence of GPU acceleration represent clear tradeoffs for storage-heavy or parallel computing tasks. This instance is configured for workloads such as database operations, memory-cached web serving, software compilation, and medium-scale language model inference.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8369B x86_64 processor running at 2.7 GHz. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core, but contains no local storage or GPU hardware. Network throughput is rated at a baseline of 16 Gbps. Benchmarks indicate average performance across CPU and memory operations, with a Passmark CPU score of 35326.14 and a strong text generation speed of 282.15 tokens per second on small language models. The lack of local storage represents a key tradeoff, making the instance qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-heavy tasks that do not require high-speed local disk access. It is suited for database operations, software compilation, and memory-cached web serving.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 32 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for database operations and memory-cached workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.8xlarge features 32 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps bandwidth for memory-intensive database and compilation workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and high RAM density for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores running at 2.7 GHz
256.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core
16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with zero local storage
Strong text generation performance for small language models
Configured for database operations, software compilation, and caching
